instruction: Help me organize the logistics information

command: DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.screensaver idle-activation-enabled false 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 gsettings set org.gnome.desktop.session idle-delay 0 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset s off 2>/dev/null; DISPLAY=:1 xset -dpms 2>/dev/null; true

python3 -c "
import openpyxl
wb = openpyxl.Workbook()
ws = wb.active
ws['A1'] = 'Order No'
ws['B1'] = 'Origin City'
ws['C1'] = 'Destination City'
ws['D1'] = 'Freight(CNY)'
ws['E1'] = 'Est. Days'
ws['A2'] = 'LG001'
ws['B2'] = 'Shanghai'
ws['C2'] = 'Beijing'
ws['D2'] = 25
ws['E2'] = 2
ws['A3'] = 'LG002'
ws['B3'] = 'Guangzhou'
ws['C3'] = 'Chengdu'
ws['D3'] = 35
ws['E3'] = 3
ws['A4'] = 'LG003'
ws['B4'] = 'Beijing'
ws['C4'] = 'Hangzhou'
ws['D4'] = 20
ws['E4'] = 2
ws['A5'] = 'LG004'
ws['B5'] = 'Shenzhen'
ws['C5'] = 'Wuhan'
ws['D5'] = 30
ws['E5'] = 3
wb.save('/home/user/Desktop/logistics.xlsx')
"

phases.instruction: Help me organize the logistics information
Find the order with the lowest freight from /home/user/Desktop/logistics.xlsx, append to /home/user/Desktop/logistics_memo.txt: 'Lowest Freight Order: LG003 (20 CNY, Beijing to Hangzhou)', save
